def negative_list_materialization_first_element():
    rule_id = "list_materialization_first_element"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "list(...)[0] style access that materializes a whole list just to read the first element."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
